总之，观看过程中观感很好，不至于出现什么让人不舒服的地方，然后放着放着就丢了，反正这文能让人一直看下去，而且作者更新稳定，如果后文整体质量不崩，那就属于质量上佳有口皆碑的类型了。
期待作者高质量地完结。","text_exts":[{"e":4,"s":0,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742092652EE6E19A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227511594001580901145%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227472417299962547224%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748935839,"group_id":"7472417299962547224","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0/qWbtjUtVGVQPYKQKDHBU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7fa0107ed00c4e8a95c6da56eb869634~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787319&x-signature=BSJ9wk3U6DieHxgu5l5QJP0uqJQ%3D","user_id":"100186529117","user_name":"从今天开始做苏丹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100186529117","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472417299962547224","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】【欢乐向】【无女主】【西幻领主种田】【慢热】
“将一团血肉、几根碎骨、大半个完整的大脑用藤蔓相互链接，加点来自异世界的灵魂，就能创造出‘玩家’——一种神奇的核动力驴！”
“当然，我更喜欢叫他们‘拼好人’。”
穿越畸变异世界的埃德靠着自己的伴生能力从老家召唤来了一些玩家为自己打工，就在他打算借此躺平的时候却发现自己的玩家们开始越来越不对劲了……
“什么叫你们的世界被侵蚀了？”
“这里的技能现实中也能用是什么意思？”
“那几个国家，不要再派特工来学艺了，我真不是什么赛博教官！”
“这秩序之主的位置如何使得？哎呀，你们，你们这是害苦了我啊……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3e4df0b7ad4b9d59f2d4cebce3afd680","author":"蒸汽饭桶","author_id":"","book_id":"7472417299962547224","book_name":"异界入侵？一把抓住炼化成游戏！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b87050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7472721783490413118","read_count":"67165","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1987513"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"960","tags":"游戏体育,系统,穿越,无女主,灵气复苏,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92f4cc751aa501167b2f8ab263ff66ec~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393265&x-signature=Kjlk1S8oilQsp9Qf2EndzFXviC0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"422649954309966","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"349"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230354252017AB2EF5F72EE6E19A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16
